text.title: QA Suite Health Metrics Canon Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: 17 metrics tracked; weekly report is 4 pages; nobody reads it.
antipattern.fix: Pick top 6; deprecate the rest; record rationale.

antipattern.symptom: KPI dashboard shows green but ledger shows 30% flake; numbers are not from CI.
antipattern.fix: Switch metrics pipeline to CI ingest; revoke manual entry.

antipattern.symptom: Flake rate breaches threshold 8 weeks running; nothing happens.
antipattern.fix: Add automation: on breach open ticket against route_to_methodology; assign to owner.
